title: XV7 architecture summary
summary: XV7 uses a core API, frontend, Open WebUI, and Ollama in a local Docker stack.
body: Stable architecture: core FastAPI service handles sessions, runtime model routing, and auth-protected mutation routes; frontend provides local UI and API bridge; Open WebUI provides browser chat UI; Ollama provides local model inference. Runtime includes model profile/effective model endpoints and safe model-use receipts.

facts.statement: XV7 core API exposes health, runtime model endpoints, and session routes.
Open WebUI and frontend are separate services in the Docker stack.

evidence: Stable repo structure and compose services.
